style_effects: Gentle droplets of translucent blue water cling to Mr. Mime's form, drifting upward in slow, rhythmic spirals like tiny liquid orbs. A soft, luminous cerulean aura pulses gently around his body, casting ripples of cool light that mimic underwater currents. The atmosphere glows with a serene, deep-blue luminescence, evoking the calm depth of a moonlit ocean. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
